why_it_blocks_retest: Retest remains blocked because framework_governance_gate is still the highest_blocking_gate in the active phase_b_retest_readiness_gate and still fails on overlap risk, signal sparsity-flatness, baseline validation candidate usability, and official strategy retry reopening.
what_must_be_true_to_clear: framework_governance_gate_cleared means framework_governance_gate is no longer FAIL in the active retest-readiness path on the updated provisional core stack and none of its four active fail thresholds remain false.
framework_governance_gate is no longer the highest_blocking_gate on the active minimum retest path
required_evidence: A refreshed overlap audit artifact stating overlap risk is no longer high and baseline_filter_overlap_risk_acceptable = true on the updated provisional core stack.
A refreshed trade-design or equivalent framework audit stating signal_sparsity_flatness_audit_passed = true on the updated provisional core stack.
A refreshed baseline validation artifact stating baseline_validation_candidate_usable = true on the updated provisional core stack.

A formal governance decision that explicitly resolves official_strategy_retry_reopened for framework-governance purposes on the updated provisional core stack, while retest and paper trading remain blocked until other official blockers clear.
A refreshed active readiness artifact showing framework_governance_gate is no longer FAIL and no longer the highest_blocking_gate on the minimum retest path.
sequencing_rules: Do not open retest during this setup phase.
Do not open paper trading during this setup phase.
Do not open new strategy experiments or backlog hypotheses.
Resolve only the four active framework_governance_gate thresholds before opening any downstream retest blocker family.
Treat official_strategy_retry_reopened as a formal governance-decision dependency and not as permission to open retest or paper trading.
Do not open atr_stop_corporate_action_policy or retest_governance_artifacts_sync unless framework_governance_gate execution produces an explicit dependency handoff artifact.
exit_criteria: The meaning of framework_governance_gate_cleared is frozen explicitly.
The minimum evidence required to change framework_governance_gate from fail/blocked to cleared is frozen explicitly.
Dependency states for all active framework_governance_gate thresholds are listed without ambiguity.
Roadmap points directly to framework_governance_gate resolution execution on the updated provisional core stack.
Paper trading remains blocked and retest remains blocked.
